title: Worker that handles :snooze with attempt-aware backoff
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.TwitterPostWorker` (queue `:social`, max_attempts 25). perform/1 takes `%{"post_id" => id}` and calls `MyApp.Twitter.publish(post_id)`. On `{:error, :rate_limited, retry_after}`, return `{:snooze, retry_after}`. On `{:error, :dry_run_mode}`, return `{:cancel, :dry_run}` (not an error; the job shouldn't run in dry-run). On `{:error, reason}`, return `{:error, reason}`. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/twitter_post_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Three-way return protocol discrimination: snooze vs cancel vs error. Tests that the author uses the right symbol for each semantic class.
